name: MiniMax
description: Registers MiniMax as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback MiniMax API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: MiniMax API key
settings.description: MiniMax API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to MINIMAX_API_KEY.

providers.name: MiniMax
providers.description: Refreshes MiniMax chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
